panels.description: Wide panoramic shot: Little Toomai, a young boy, sits on the neck of the giant elephant Kala Nag, eyes wide with terror and wonder. In the foreground, numerous wild elephants emerge from dark forest shadows into a moonlit jungle clearing. The boy is counting on his fingers, looking overwhelmed.

bubbles.text: One, two, three... so many... I've lost count.

panels.description: Medium action shot: A chaotic, diverse group of wild elephants gathered in the clearing. White-tusked males, calves under mothers, and scarred old bulls are visible in the moonlight. Some are standing head-to-head, others swaying. High detail on the textures of bark-like trunks and dusty hide.
Medium shot: Toomai grips Kala Nag's ears tightly, staying low. He watches Pudmini and a mysterious elephant with rope galls enter the assembly. The atmosphere is thick with jungle tension.

bubbles.text: Pudmini? Even she is here... I must stay still.

panels.description: Close-up: The moon is suddenly obscured by clouds, casting the scene into near-total silhouette and deep black shadows. Only the glint of tusks and the outlines of massive, moving elephant bodies are visible.

bubbles.text: The light fades... darkness swallows the clearing.

panels.description: Extreme close-up: Little Toomai's face, sweating and shivering, eyes squeezed shut as a massive, wrinkled trunk snakes into the frame and brushes his knee. An elephant trumpets in the background, represented by jagged, heavy bubble borders.

bubbles.text: I'm all alone in the dark...
